name: Consumer Electronics & Audio/Video
subject: HDMI 2.1 cable factory for {company_name}
body:
Hi {contact_name},

{company_name}'s product range looks solid — but I'm guessing your cable supply is through a middleman. We're an HDMI-certified factory in China (also a Vietnam plant), and our AV clients cut costs by 25-35% going direct.

HDMI 2.1, DP 2.1, USB4 — all CE/RoHS/UL certified with full TDR testing. 18 years, dual production bases, 800K pcs/month.

Want me to send a quick quote on your best-selling cable? That way you can compare prices.
